item.title:
老子说： 天之道，损有余而补不足。 （翻译：杀富济贫） 人之道，损不足以奉有余。 （翻译：劫贫致富）
创业者说： AI 创业之道，损有余而补有余。 （翻译：赚有钱人的钱）
玉伯说： AI 创业之道...
item.description:
老子说： 天之道，损有余而补不足。 （翻译：杀富济贫） 人之道，损不足以奉有余。 （翻译：劫贫致富）
创业者说： AI 创业之道，损有余而补有余。 （翻译：赚有钱人的钱）
玉伯说： AI 创业之道，损有余以奉不足。 （翻译：难）
截图：与 DeepSeek 的讨论。发现国产模型，在聊天思考这块，确实不比 Opus 差，甚至中文表达更流畅，更有交锋感。有意思。
--- @lifesinger | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 311
item.author: @lifesinger

You can read the full TabulAI manifesto here: https://t.co/R23bu1pea3
9/9
--- @tunguz | ❤️ 8 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 462
item.author: @tunguz

item.title:
· Optimization for optionality and flexibility
· Use of market principles, internally and...
item.description:
· Optimization for optionality and flexibility
· Use of market principles, internally and externally, to guide our work
· Minimal outside funding, and only when it does not compromise the principles above
8/9
--- @tunguz | ❤️ 5 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 479
item.author: @tunguz

item.title: Today I want to share one of the main projects I have been working on: TabulAI. Tabular data runs mu...
item.description:
Today I want to share one of the main projects I have been working on: TabulAI. Tabular data runs much of the business world, yet it has not received the same sustained research attention as images, text, audio, or code. TabulAI exists to change that.
1/9 https://t.co/g6qmx5rvhc
--- @tunguz | ❤️ 31 | 🔁 1 | 💬 5 | 👁 964
item.author: @tunguz

item.title: 今天发每条推文前都仔细确认勾上了「你关注的账号及其关注的账号」，终于没看到 SPAM 了。虽然会挡住一部分 follower 的评论，先这样度过一段清净的时间吧… https://t.co/s3tFs...
item.author: @tualatrix
